name: MEI FENG
title: SENTINEL OF STEEL

abilities.name: Constant Motion
abilities.text: When this model declares a trigger, it may move up to 2".

abilities.name: Railroaded
abilities.text: When an attack action is declared targeting this model, this model may drain two (soulstone) to make the action fail.

abilities.name: Refine
abilities.text: When a Scrap marker is made or removed within 4", a friendly model within 4" may gain a Bolstered token.

actions.name: Razor Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Before declaring triggers, this model may drain a (fortitude) to declare up to two different triggers on this action, regardless of suits.

triggers.name: Reactive Chemicals
triggers.text: A different model within 2" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Rounding Kick
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (aura)1" of this model.

triggers.name: Daze
triggers.text: Target gains a Stunned token and this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Keep to Schedule
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another ally. Target declares the Ride the Rails action, which receives +2 Skl.

triggers.name: Tiger Strike
triggers.text: Once per turn. After resolving the generated action, place this model in base contact with the made marker. Then, this model may declare a (melee) action.

actions.name: Forged of Steel
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Target gains a Bolstered token

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='SENTINEL OF STEEL' back='Sentinel of Steel'
extraction_notes: Keywords section shows 'Loyalty Revitalized' on left and 'Forgeling' on right - both treated as keywords
Health bar shows numbered pips 1-14, counting to 14 health
Tiger Strike trigger uses (fortitude) icon instead of standard suit symbol
